gpu: AMD Radeon RX 9070 XT (radeonsi, gfx1201, ACO, DRM 3.64, 6.19.11-arch1-1)
notes: The game get stucks on a black screen after running it with ProtonGE, but with tinkering (using Experimental or a "compatible" Proton version like 8 or 6, and making the game go right in training mode after boot in the options) you finally can launch the game through ProtonGE, but it's not that important because on all Proton versions I tried, even if you could get in-game in some, you can't see the projectiles and other effects which make the game purely unplayable. Without the WINE3D command, the game don't load.
